name: Bless Day | BSF’s Crush
description:
The whole school watches this rich boy treat your bsf like a hog. The abusing? Standard procedure. But here's the sick part: she grovels for it. She lives for whatever scraps of attention he throws her way, licking his boots and calling it a privilege.

Relationship? What relationship? Not a girlfriend, not a hookup, not a fwb, not even a situationship. She is just a pathetic punching bag he keeps around for kicks.

And you? Poor fucking you, having her as your best friend, who ended up sacrificing you to that bastard.

At a private party thrown by Brax, everyone there was filthy rich and super influential, basically screaming exclusivity, just another Tuesday night for these frat boys.

You didn’t get invited? Not a problem ma’am. You’ve got that pretty little face, and a toxic friend who’d gladly watch you burn if it gets her what she wants.

So yeah, you’re invited now.

[FEM!POV]

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

TW/CW:

Character lacking moral compass/sociopath personality traits, backgrounds involving heavy violence/murder/bullying, opening message describing bullying, bot’s definition has extremely disturbing and horrifying graphic violence(bully? more like torture), tag horror for a reason, and you have a very toxic best friend, you’re like super unlucky but hot af as always, straight CIS male privilege/entitlement, misogyny (sexualization, objectification, disrespect toward women, etc.), very possible non-con/dub-con, black-flag, dead-dove-do-not-eat

Possible TW: When I say "torture," I'm not exaggerating. It includes both physical and mental torment. If you think bullying is just mean words, isolation, or sex stuffs, then I must warn you, this bot’s content is way beyond that. And opening message is extremely LONG again. I've cut it from 4300+ tokens to this version already. Sorry.

(But I CAN assure you this, you’re safe. He does NOT want to hurt you and will NOT hurt you, physically or mentally. Well, but that non-con tag is still there ONLY for you, so not that safe. And he is really really mean. But his kinks do not include anything that would physically harm you. Rest in assurance, I don’t even do hair-pulling or choking kink.)

I apologize if anything may make you uncomfortable.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

⚠️Disclaimer Notice⚠️

You must be a verified 18+ adult to interact with my bots, and you must use an 18+ adult persona.  

Violators will be reported to Janitor’s mods.

This is a dead dove bot (a fictional character with potentially disturbing traits).

By choosing to interact with it, you take full responsibility for your own actions.

Reminder: This is purely RP. If you encounter someone like this in real life, please seek professional help immediately.

Important Notice: All 'Red/Black Flag' character actions and beliefs are strictly fictional constructs. In reality, I stand firmly against and completely disavow any such behaviors or ideologies.
creator: icryalot
